provisions.description: Non-exclusive franchise grant to use Hotel System at approved Site
Term: 20 years from 1st day of Opening Month
AOP protection limited to AOP Term only; 4-hotel acquisition exception
After AOP Term: no territorial protection whatsoever
Right of first offer only if Exhibit C signed (strategic markets)
Royalty: 5% of GRR, due by Payment Day
System Services Charges: Commercial Services Fee + other mandatory fees
WOH assessment: 4.5% of eligible revenue
Late fee $225 + 1.5%/month interest on amounts 7+ days past due
Liquidated damages on termination: formula-based, substantial
Post-termination royalty: $5,000/day for failure to de-identify
Must construct/renovate per Design and Construction Standards
Must acquire and install Technology System from designated vendors
Must open within 24 months (new) or 6 months (conversion)
7 pre-opening conditions including inspection and approval
Must comply with System Standards (3,641 pages), as periodically modified
Must use CRS, GDS, ADS; honor all confirmed reservations
Must maintain hotel per System Standards including periodic upgrades/renovations
5% FF&E reserve monthly deposit required
Must permit inspections at any time with or without notice
7-part mandatory initial training program (300+ hours total)
Must attend ongoing training, conventions, summits as required
Replacement Core Management must complete training within 90 days
Curable defaults with cure periods of 24hrs/10days/30days/60days
Non-curable defaults: bankruptcy, felony, unauthorized transfer, etc.
Upon default, franchisor may also suspend CRS/GDS/ADS access and remove from advertising
No transfers without approval (FA, Hotel, assets, Controlling Ownership)
Transfer conditions: qualify, train, sign then-current FA, renovate, release
Death/disability: 6 months to transfer
During term: cannot be Competing Brand Owner (5+ hotel competing brand)
Post-term: no noncompete
Personal guaranty of all FA obligations (monetary and non-monetary) by Controlling Ownership Interest holders
Guarantor Monetary Threshold: minimum net worth and liquidity, CPI-adjusted annually
Mandatory arbitration at AAA, within 10 miles of franchisor HQ (Chicago). Individual basis only, no class-wide. Federal Arbitration Act governs.
Illinois law governs (subject to FAA and state law)
Forum: Illinois (subject to arbitration)
Waiver of punitive, exemplary, treble damages
Must maintain insurance per System Standards. If franchisee fails, franchisor may obtain at franchisee cost + $200/room/year
Must indemnify franchisor for all claims from application, development, operation, breach, proportionate share of network defense costs
Franchisor has independent, unlimited access to all Technology System data
Guest Information is franchisor's property
All Innovations are franchisor's property (work-for-hire)
If repair cost <= Damage Threshold: must repair and reopen within 24 months. If exceeds: may terminate with reduced liquidated damages.
